summary: Dark mode feature fully tested. All 11 specified dark mode behaviors verified via Playwright + JS evaluation. Toggle, persistence, CSS variables, FOUC prevention, badges, table borders, command palette, and light mode revert all pass.

issues: Platform Super Admin badge still uses hardcoded Tailwind violet classes (bg-violet-100 text-violet-700). Visually still renders in dark mode due to custom monospace styling, but technically not themed via aa-* vars. Previously noted in iteration_296.

test_results.toggle_visible_light_mode: PASS - [data-testid='dark-mode-toggle'] found, shows Moon icon + 'Dark Mode' label in light mode
test_results.toggle_label_changes_to_light_mode: PASS - Button shows Sun icon + 'Light Mode' when dark active
test_results.badge_success_dark: PASS - .aa-badge-success color = rgb(63, 185, 80) (#3fb950) - green visible in dark
test_results.table_row_border_dark: PASS - Table td border-color = rgb(48, 54, 61) (#30363d) visible in dark
test_results.command_palette_dark: PASS - Ctrl+K opens [data-testid='command-palette'] with dark bg in dark mode
test_results.fouc_prevention_reload: PASS - After page.reload(), html has aa-dark class immediately (inline script in index.html works)
test_results.dark_persists_react_mount: PASS - aa-dark class still present after React mounts and useEffect runs
test_results.toggle_light_mode_reload: PASS - After reload in dark mode, toggle shows 'Light Mode'
test_results.revert_to_light_mode: PASS - Click toggle → aa-dark removed from html element
test_results.toggle_label_back_to_dark_mode: PASS - Button shows Moon icon + 'Dark Mode' after revert

critical_code_review_comments: FOUC prevention inline script in index.html is correct and working - applies aa-dark before React mounts.
Dark mode CSS variables are complete: --aa-bg, --aa-card, --aa-surface, --aa-border, --aa-text all override correctly via html.aa-dark block.
darkMode state correctly initialized from localStorage on mount (avoids flash on first render).
Role badge (Platform Super Admin) uses hardcoded Tailwind violet - minor cosmetic issue in dark mode, not breaking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode fully working. All 11 specified behaviors pass. Previous Phase 2 tests (iteration_296) all still pass. Only outstanding cosmetic note: Platform Super Admin role badge uses hardcoded Tailwind violet-100/violet-700 which doesn't use aa-* CSS vars (works visually but is not theme-adaptive). Dark mode CSS variables: bg=#0d1117, card=#161b22, surface=#1c2128, border=#30363d, text=#e6edf3, accent=#4f8ef7 all confirmed correct.
